title: postapiauthregisterwithvaliddata
description: Test the user registration endpoint with valid email, phone, username, and password to ensure it returns 201 with success and user data.

title: postapiauthloginwithvalidcredentials
description: Test the login endpoint with valid identifier and password to verify it returns 200 with success, user data, and sets JWT in httpOnly cookie.

title: postapiauthrefreshwithvalidrefresh
description: Test the token refresh endpoint with a valid refresh token to confirm it returns 200 with success and issues a new access token.

title: postapiauthlogoutclearsession
description: Test the logout endpoint to ensure it revokes the refresh token, clears cookies, and returns 200 with success.

title: postapiauthrequestpasswordresetwithvalidemail
description: Test the password reset request endpoint with a valid email to verify it returns 200 with a generic success message.

title: postapiauthresetpasswordwithvalidtoken
description: Test the password reset endpoint with a valid token and new password to ensure it returns 200 indicating success.

title: getapiauthmewithvalidtoken
description: Test the authenticated user profile endpoint with a valid JWT token to confirm it returns 200 with user data.

title: putapiusersmeupdateprofile
description: Test updating user profile with valid data including username, displayName, bio, and avatarUrl to verify it returns 200 with updated user data.

title: postapiusersonboardingcompleteonboarding
description: Test completing onboarding with valid displayName, username, bio, and interests to ensure it returns 200 with success and updated user data.

title: postapiuploadavatarwithvalidimage
description: Test avatar upload endpoint with a valid image file (jpeg, less than 5MB) to verify it returns 200 with success and avatarUrl.
